title: Two-AI — three views inside a language model
tagline: A small GPT-style AI running live in your browser, cracked open three ways so you can watch what an LLM is actually doing

functionality.name: Runs In-Browser
functionality.blurb: A small GPT-style AI runs entirely in your browser, no server needed.

functionality.name: Word-Meaning Galaxy
functionality.blurb: Visualizes the model's word-meanings as a navigable galaxy.

functionality.name: Live Attention Maps
functionality.blurb: Shows live attention maps of which words the model is looking at.

functionality.name: Next-Word Tree
functionality.blurb: Displays an exploding tree of the next words the model considered.

detail_body: A small GPT-style AI running entirely in your browser, opened up three ways to reveal what's actually happening inside a language model.
See a galaxy of word-meanings, live attention maps showing which words the model "looks at," and an exploding tree of the next words it considered — a rare look inside an LLM.
